Effective Go - The Go Programming Language

This document gives tips for writing clear, idiomatic Go code. It augments the language spec, the Tour of Go, and How to Write Go Code.

go - How does context cancellation work in Go - Stack Overflow

Learn how to use context in Go for cancellation, timeouts, and request-scoped values across API boundaries.

context package - pkg.go.dev

Package context defines the Context type, which carries deadlines, cancellation signals, and other request-scoped values across API boundaries and between processes.

Context patterns & best practices - Example Docs

A guide to advanced context patterns: cancellation propagation, deadline tuning, and pitfalls with <goroutine> lifecycles.

golang/go: src/context/context.go - GitHub

The reference implementation of context in the Go standard library.
